</parameter>

</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

Optimus_Project_ID
</parameter>
<parameter=report_type>
Status Update
</parameter>

["Executive Summary", "Milestone Achievement", "Resource Utilization", "Risk Assessment"]
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
